# [FR-001] A valid FR with an unknown object archetype

## Description

The system SHALL do a real, concrete, normative thing on request.

## Specification

The implementation SHALL satisfy the described behavior under all inputs.

## Acceptance Criteria

| ID | Criteria |
|----|----------|
| FR-001-AC-1 | It does the thing |
| FR-001-AC-2 | It does the other thing |
